title: MANIT Bhopal Research Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
organization: Maulana Azad National Institute of Technology Bhopal (MANIT Bhopal)
short_info: Maulana Azad National Institute of Technology Bhopal (MANIT Bhopal) has released an official notification for the recruitment of 1 Research Assistant Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply Offline by sending the application form to the official address. The last date to submit the application is 15-06-2026.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: B. Arch / B. Plan with M. Plan / M. Tech in Transport Planning /Engineering having minimum 1 year of professional experience, Proficiency in research report writing, data analysis, and academic communication, Working knowledge of GIS and AutoCAD is a must
qualification.details: Research Assistant: B. Arch / B. Plan with M. Plan / M. Tech in Transport Planning /Engineering having minimum 1 year of professional experience. Proficiency in research report writing, data analysis, and academic communication. Working knowledge of GIS and AutoCAD is a must.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for MANIT Bhopal Research Assistant Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
